posts.title: Because of his wife’s support of terrorism, @NYCMayor @ZohranKMamdani cannot receive a federal security clearance. He’s a national-security threat. We can’t trust him to work with U.S. intelligence agencies to protect NYC. He must resign. Or @GovKathyHochul must remove him.

quotedTweet.content: Mayor Zohran Mamdani claimed his wife Rama Duwaji isn’t a public figure after facing uproar for her liking social media posts celebrating Hamas’ Oct. 7, 2023 attack. https://t.co/P3ERbajdzM

twitter.content:
Because of his wife’s support of terrorism, @NYCMayor @ZohranKMamdani cannot receive a federal security clearance.
